title: The Bee and the Dove
lines: A Bee, collecting nectar from flowers by a stream, fell into the water.
A Dove saw her drowning and plucked a leaf and dropped it for her to climb onto.
Some days later, a hunter aimed his gun at the Dove.
The Bee, remembering her debt, flew at the hunter's face and stung him.
The hunter missed his shot, and the Dove flew away to safety.
